user.title: Connect to Trading212
user.description: Enter your Trading212 API credentials. Generate them at Settings → API in the Trading212 app.

data_description.label: A short name for this account (e.g. "John" or "Jane"). Required if you are adding more than one Trading212 integration.

sensors.title: Choose Sensors
sensors.description: Choose which sensors to create per position and pie.

data_description.position_sensors: Value, Quantity, P&L, and P&L % are enabled by default and cover the lovelace card's main view. Average Price, Current Price, and Daily Gain/Loss (%) are opt-in and only shown in the expanded detail panel.
data_description.pie_sensors: Value, Invested, P&L %, P&L, and Dividends Gained are enabled by default and cover the lovelace card's main view. The rest are opt-in and only shown in the expanded detail panel. Note: P&L is not shown by the lovelace card.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — check your Key ID and Secret in Trading212 settings.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Trading212. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
error.invalid_poll_interval: Poll interval must be at least 30 seconds.

abort.already_configured: This Trading212 account is already configured.
